name: Microsoft 365
description: Adds Microsoft 365 workflow guidance using the official CLI for Microsoft 365 as backend.

account.description: Default Microsoft 365 account UPN. Example: user@example.com.

tenantId.description: Microsoft Entra tenant id or verified domain. Can also be provided through M365_TENANT_ID.

clientId.description: Microsoft Entra application/client id. Can also be provided through M365_CLIENT_ID.

connectionName.description: Optional CLI for Microsoft 365 connection name. Defaults to openclaw-microsoft365.

scopes.description: Optional delegated Graph scopes, used only as a convenience env value for setup snippets.

scopes.label: Delegated Graph scopes
scopes.placeholder: openid profile email offline_access User.Read Mail.ReadWrite ...
